title: Blooming Good Deeds Knot Wrap
description: Tie up a few of our limited-edition products in this organic cotton Knot Wrap for a fragrant gift that celebrates Eid.

images.alt: Blooming Good Deeds. A square, fabric, knot wrap. There is a bright, pink, spotted border with palm tree illustrations in each corner. The centre shows a vibrantly, colourful illustrated, abstract scene of palm trees, flowers and lanterns.

Blooming Good Deeds. A square, fabric, knot wrap. There is a bright, pink, spotted border with palm tree illustrations in each corner. The centre shows a vibrantly, colourful illustrated, abstract scene of palm trees, flowers and lanterns.

The image shows a deep, red background with blurred warm lights and lanterns. The Blooming Good Deeds fabric knot wrap has been neatly wrapped around an unknown gift with a neat knot and a gift tag which reads "Eid Mubarak".
The image shows a super close-up of the Blooming Good Deeds, Eid-themed knot wrap. The shot is focused on the texture of the material and the vibrancy of the bright colours included.
